docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TINA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TINA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TINA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 643 CENTRAL AVENUE, S.F. CA. 94117, ** INCLUDING ALL UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES, ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $28.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TINA DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT AND PREJUDGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. SERVED MAY-14-2008, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TINA
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO. SERVED MAY-14-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, TINA
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF COURNALE & CO.
